strategy_notes: Two-attempt explore. STEP 0 LOCALIZATION (SAM3 on agentview hi-res, used on both attempts): WHITE porcelain mug (-0.061,-0.150,0.518, score 0.61), YELLOW white_yellow mug (-0.192,0.026,0.516, score 0.84), RED decoy (-0.046,0.119,0.536, score 0.91), LP left plate (-0.029,-0.298,0.448, score 0.94), RP right plate (0.002,0.279,0.447, score 0.91). All sanity gates from robust_recipe_t4 passed (LP.y<-0.20<+0.20<RP.y, mug top_z in [0.51,0.54], plate top_z ~0.45). Convention LP.y=-0.298<0<+0.279=RP.y → image-left=-y world=task-left. WHITE→LP, YELLOW→RP. ATTEMPT 1 (FAILED, archived in prior attempts Followed robust_recipe_t4 verbatim. WHITE→LP worked (pi0_pick peak_lift=0.113, chunks=5; placed cleanly). YELLOW: pi0_pick 'pick up the yellow mug' succeeded (peak_lift=0.109, chunks=6); aim-past at (-0.003,0.329,0.62) stalled at z=0.602 (7.5cm short of recipe's expected 0.527; OSC y-wall biting MUCH harder than at s10). Descend to z=0.50 had zero further descent. Release from z=0.602 landed yellow at +y edge of RP (not predicate-firing). Ran Fallback B closed-gripper push toward -y; push hit yellow above CoG and TIPPED it (unrecoverable upright cylinder). ATTEMPT 2 (SUCCESS, this audit): Reset. Identical WHITE→LP (pi0_pick peak_lift=0.053, chunks=4 — even cleaner). For YELLOW, switched strategy from manual carry to pi0_doubled with full task language (Fallback A.3 rung). Pre-pose over YELLOW at (-0.192,0.026,0.62) then pi0_doubled 'put the yellow and white mug on the right plate' max_chunks=40 — Pi0 self-completed pick+carry+place in 11 chunks (peak_lift=0.0995, min_gripper_opening=0.0103, peak_eef_z=0.715, min_eef_z=0.518). Predicate fired with eef at (0.001,0.330,0.529). KEY LESSON: On s0, the OSC y-wall on the +y plate is SIGNIFICANTLY tighter than on s10 (z=0.602 stall vs s10's z=0.549), making the manual aim-past + descend approach in the recipe unreliable. pi0_doubled with the full task language (Fallback A.3) bypassed the manual y-wall fight entirely — Pi0's trained place trajectory threads the workspace edge and lands the mug squarely on the plate. Recommendation: for any swap-perturbed t4 seed where the manual aim-past stalls at z>0.58, escalate immediately to pi0_doubled 'put the yellow and white mug on the right plate' max_chunks=40 instead of attempting Fallback B push.

yellow.method: pi0_doubled 'put the yellow and white mug on the right plate'
